extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won the sprint in Albi after ALAPHILIPPE's team destroyed the field with crosswind acceleration 30km out, dropping PINOT, PORTE, URÁN 1:16.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE's Deceuninck team weaponized crosswinds on sprint stage 30km out, splitting field despite breakaway still ahead.
VIVIANI took pulls at front for team tactics not sprint position, signaling premeditated echelon attack.
MITCHELTON placed TRENTIN and YATES Adam at front during split, protecting climber in crosswinds unusually.
GC teams caught sleeping before rest day, losing 1:16 when sprinter teams controlled tempo.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: orchestrated field destruction on sprint stage before rest day, aggressive yellow jersey defense unexpected
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: lost 1:16 in crosswind split on flat stage, positioning failure before rest day catastrophic
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: caught behind in echelon split, lost 1:16 on stage he should have finished safely
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: negative: dropped in crosswinds with PINOT group, 1:16 loss eliminates podium hopes
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: lost 1:16 in same group as PINOT, caught out despite strong team
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: avoided echelon split that caught rivals, stayed in front group
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: caught in group 2+ minutes down, catastrophic positioning error
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: positive: worked at front during crosswind attack despite being sprinter, team-first execution
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: launched last in sprint chaos and won, timing advantage when SAGAN boxed
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: boxed out in sprint finale despite perfect green jersey positioning earlier
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: neutral: perfect position into final 900m but still no stage win
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: neutral: fourth sprint podium without win, consistent positioning but no killer instinct
